title: MInecraft Role-play
description: This mod adds in role-play elements specifically a custom leveling system where the player can choose what skills to spec into when
body:
This mod adds in a certain element from role-play games specifically a player choice based leveling system where well the player chooses what skills to level up and when
this mod adds in some of your standard rpg skills which can be increased by the player when/if they choose
disclaimer this mod does not turn minecraft into a proper rpg it only adds in a 'levelable skills' system
